output.sparql:
PREFIX wdt: <http://www.wikidata.org/prop/direct/>
PREFIX wd: <http://www.wikidata.org/entity/>
PREFIX wikibase: <http://wikiba.se/ontology#>
SELECT ?station WHERE {
  ?station wdt:P31 wd:Q15958 ; wdt:P5251 ?capacity .
  ?capacity wikibase:quantityAmount ?amount ; wikibase:quantityUnit wd:Q11573 .
  FILTER(?amount >= 10)
}

Based on standard Wikidata structure, this query should work, but the data might be missing in the specific QLever instance used here.
